project_type: Salesforce DX (SFDX) Agile Delivery Management App
build_system: Salesforce DX (sfdx-project.json). No local build/test possible without sf CLI connected to an org.
test_framework: Apex test classes (e.g., ChecklistServiceTest.cls). No local test runner available.
build_command: N/A - Salesforce metadata project, validated by XML structure correctness
test_command: N/A - No local test execution; validation is structural (well-formed XML, correct metadata format)
verification_instructions: Verify all XML files are well-formed, all metadata references match existing objects/fields, and package.xml includes all new components.
setup_instructions: No local setup needed. This is a metadata-only Salesforce project deployed via package.xml.
environment_constraints: No Salesforce CLI (sf/sfdx) available. No org connection. Validation limited to file structure and XML correctness. No Docker needed.
contribution_requirements: API version 60.0 for all metadata. Follow existing naming patterns. Update package.xml with all new components.
key_patterns: Quick Actions go in force-app/main/default/quickActions/ as .quickAction-meta.xml files. Flows go in force-app/main/default/flows/ as .flow-meta.xml files. LWCs go in force-app/main/default/lwc/<componentName>/ with .html, .js, .js-meta.xml, and optional .css files. Layouts use the existing pattern in force-app/main/default/layouts/.
directory_structure: force-app/main/default/ contains: applications/, classes/, customPermissions/, email/, layouts/, lwc/, notificationtypes/, objects/ (with 8 custom objects), permissionsets/, tabs/, triggers/. No quickActions/ or flows/ directories yet - they must be created.
